conversations.message: Hello traveler. I am Serg, the Bounty Dealer.
It is great to see you. Can I interest you in my bounties?
Alrighty then. I'll see you around next time, warrior!

I'm a bounty dealer! Once you have completed some objective or quest, you come to me with a bounty ticket which confirms you've completed it. I give you little rewards in return! Click me to see the latest bounties I offer.
Welcome back, warrior! Click me to see what new bounties I offer.

choices.text: Could you explain to me what you do again?
